tuning: E A D G B E
content:
(no capo) or (capo 1)

([ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch])

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
Keep drinking coffee, stare me down across the table[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
While I look outside[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                          [ch]Dm[/ch] 
So many things Id say if only I were able[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                          [ch]Dm[/ch]                                      [ch]G[/ch]
But I just keep quiet and count the cars that pass by[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                      
Youve got opinions, man[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                                              [ch]G[/ch]
Were all entitled to em, but I never asked[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
So let me thank you for your time, and try not to waste anymore of mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
And get out of here fast[/tab]


[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                                                         [ch]C[/ch]
I hate to break it to you babe, but Im not drowning[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Theres no one here to save[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
Who cares if you disagree?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
You are not me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
Who made you king of anything?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch] 
So you dare tell me who to be?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Who died and made you king of anything?[/tab]

([ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch])

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                        [ch]Dm[/ch]
You sound so innocent, all full of good intent[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Swear you know best[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]Dm[/ch] 
But you expect me to jump up on board with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Dm[/ch] 
And ride off into your delusional sunset[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                             [ch]Dm[/ch]
Im not the one whos lost with no direction[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
But youll never see[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                          
Youre so busy making maps with my name on them in all caps[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                         [ch]G[/ch]
You got the talking down, just not the listening[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]Em[/ch]
And who cares if you disagree?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
You are not me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
Who made you king of anything?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
So you dare tell me who to be?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
Who died and made you king of anything?[/tab]


[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]  
All my life Ive tried to make everybody happy[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
While I just hurt and hide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                                                            [ch]C[/ch] 
Waiting for someone to tell me its my turn to decide[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
Who cares if you disagree?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
You are not me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
You are not me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
